heroHeadline: Hegseth Declares 'Decisive Military Victory' Over Iran; Trump Threatens 50% Tariffs on Nations Arming Tehran
heroSubtitle: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth issued the first official US framing of the conflict outcome as ceasefire holds, while Trump deployed a new economic pressure tool — 50% tariffs on any country supplying Iran with military weapons.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-08. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC, New York Times, Fox News, Military.com.
